title: CleanContainer
description: CleanContainer helps you to sort your inventory and your containers, such as chests, barrels, shulkers, minecartchests and enderchests.
body:
# CleanContainer - Fabric - 1.20.X
## **[1.21.1 | 1.21 | 1.20.6 | 1.20.5 |1.20.4] - Fabric API dependency**
### **Sort player's inventory and containers inventories**


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5t8PzNaLuSk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



## **Features**
- **Sort player's inventory & containers inventories**
  
- Transfer content
  - From containers to player's inventory
  - From player's inventory to containers
  
- Toggle **Hotbar (lock/unlock)** to prevent hotbar's items **from being moved or sorted**
- **Quick sort player's inventory** key

  ![Buttons of sorting features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c06db129f75c2e8ab6a98eae7cc17b6fc309e9a.png)

## **Accessibility**
- Custom key bind in game settings **to quick sort player's inventory.**
- Custom key bind in game settings **to change UI buttons position.**

![Accessibility key binds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af30144cadcfc29fe17876f175125e4579baef87.jpeg)
## **Changelog**
**May 2024 - mod version 1.3.0** 

_[Bug Fixes]_
- Potions getting duplicated when sorting
- Enderchest transfer to player's inventory now works
- Items durability are no longer duplicated

_[Add]_
- Keybind to change CleanContainer buttons position (far-left, left, right, far-right)

## **Disclaimers**
- CleanContainer could contain bugs and issues. 
- Please provide me feedback if you encounter any issues using it.
- Feel free to contact me for any mod ideas or CleanContainer improvements.

## **Supported containers**
